metadata.name: 04_并发循环批处理流
metadata.description: 演示如何使用循环控制器处理数组，并发调用内部节点

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["json_list"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_loop_ctrl", "type": "loop_controller", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "json_list", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "json_list"]}], "arrayVariable": "{json_list}", "itemVariable": "item", "concurrency": 2}}, "label": "循环控制器"}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {}}, "label": "循环体容器", "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, {"id": "node_loop_llm", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 50, "y": 50}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "item", "type": "string", "source": ["node_loop_ctrl", "item"]}], "modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "处理数据项：{item}\\n请翻译为英文。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "translated_item"}}, "label": "处理每一项", "parentNode": "loop_body_group", "extent": "parent"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 800, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "done", "type": "string", "value": "true", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_loop_ctrl", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_loop_ctrl", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_loop_ctrl_loop_body_group", "type": "default", "source": "node_loop_ctrl", "target": "loop_body_group", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_loop_body_group_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "loop_body_group", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["json_list"]}}, {"id": "node_loop_ctrl", "type": "loop_controller", "name": "循环控制器", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "json_list", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "json_list"]}], "arrayVariable": "{json_list}", "itemVariable": "item", "concurrency": 2}}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "name": "循环体容器", "config": {}, "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, {"id": "node_loop_llm", "type": "llm", "name": "处理每一项", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "item", "type": "string", "source": ["node_loop_ctrl",
